theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) merged with Archetype 2 (Performance Pro)
theme_and_archetype.rationale: The game demands a high-energy, adrenaline-pumping vibe resembling a night football match under floodlights. We elevate the user's requested 'Neon futuristic' theme by grounding it in a deep, textured void (stadium at night) rather than flat gradients. This ensures the neon cyan, purple, and magenta punch through with maximum contrast, while glassmorphism layers provide a premium, tactical 'playbook' feel.

rules.uppercase_labels: Overlines and small labels MUST be uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).

glassmorphism.usage: Settings Modal, Win Celebration, Floating Nav/Scoreboard
glassmorphism.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl

game_grid.usage: The main word search playable area
game_grid.classes: bg-[#0A0A0F]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl

grid_cells.default: text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors duration-200 cursor-pointer rounded-md
grid_cells.selected: bg-theme-primary text-black font-black scale-105 shadow-[0_0_12px_var(--theme-primary-glow)] transition-all duration-200

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full px-4 sm:px-6 h-screen flex flex-col justify-between py-6

bento_grid.items: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center

spacing_and_layout.generous_padding: Use p-6 or p-8 inside modals to prevent text collision and maintain a premium feel.

Header.layout: Flex container bridging Timer (Left) and Score (Right).
Header.timer: Monospaced, massive font. Pulses red when under 30 seconds.

Word_Search_Grid.layout: CSS Grid, 1:1 aspect ratio. Max width 100%.
Word_Search_Grid.interaction: Touch/swipe to select words. Must implement a visual line or pill-shaped highlight connecting start and end letters.

Knowledge_Banner.layout: Fixed near the bottom, just above controls.
Knowledge_Banner.style: Glassmorphism pill (rounded-full). Appears dynamically when a word is found.

Controls.layout: Bottom fixed bar with icon buttons.
Controls.style: Circular, glassmorphism buttons with 1px border. Hover/Active states scale down slightly (active:scale-95).

Progress_Bar.layout: Thin horizontal bar spanning the top or bottom of the screen.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All buttons MUST have hover:bg-white/10 and scale transforms.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer motion fade in and slide up for modals.
motion_and_interaction.win_celebration: Trigger confetti canvas overlay. Modal drops in with elastic bounce.
motion_and_interaction.timer_pulse: CSS keyframe pulse animation on the timer when time < 10s.

background_image.description: Abstract dark football stadium at night under heavy floodlights. Use as a fixed, cover-sized background with a dark overlay (bg-black/40) so the grid remains legible.

win_trophy_image.description: Golden trophy cup with glowing particles and neon light trails. Display inside the Win Celebration Modal.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the application is wrapped in a relative container with max-width 100vw and h-screen to prevent scrolling on mobile devices (except within modals).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone weight for the UI controls.
Implement the background image globally with `bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-fixed`.
For the theme switcher, use CSS variables for --theme-primary, --theme-secondary, etc., injected dynamically into the document root.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the unique game layout, but you may use Radix UI or Shadcn for the Settings Dialog to ensure accessibility.
